creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun Dec  1 17:58:31 2013
New Revision: 335417
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/335417

Log:
  - Update to 1.300006
  - Remove leading indefinite article from COMMENT
  - Support STAGEDIR
  
  Changes:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Email-Sender/Changes
  PR:		ports/183990
  Submitted by:	sunpoet (myself)
  Approved by:	Bill Brinzer <bill.brinzer@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/mail/p5-Email-Sender/Makefile
  head/mail/p5-Email-Sender/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/mail/p5-Email-Sender/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/mail/p5-Email-Sender/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/p5-Email-Sender/Makefile	Sun Dec  1 17:56:14 2013	(r335416)
+++ head/mail/p5-Email-Sender/Makefile	Sun Dec  1 17:58:31 2013	(r335417)
@@ -2,24 +2,30 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Email-Sender
-PORTVERSION=	0.120001
+PORTVERSION=	1.300006
 CATEGORIES=	mail perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:RJBS
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
 MAINTAINER=	bill.brinzer@gmail.com
-COMMENT=	A library for sending email
+COMMENT=	Library for sending email
+
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Email-Abstract>=3:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-Email-Abstract \
 		p5-Email-Address>=0:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-Email-Address \
 		p5-Email-Simple>=1.998:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-Email-Simple \
 		p5-List-MoreUtils>=0:${PORTSDIR}/lang/p5-List-MoreUtils \
-		p5-Moose>=0.70:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Moose \
+		p5-Module-Runtime>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Module-Runtime \
+		p5-Moo>=1.000008:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Moo \
+		p5-MooX-Types-MooseLike>=0.15:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-MooX-Types-MooseLike \
+		p5-Sub-Exporter>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Sub-Exporter \
 		p5-Sys-Hostname-Long>=0:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/p5-Sys-Hostname-Long \
 		p5-Try-Tiny>=0:${PORTSDIR}/lang/p5-Try-Tiny \
-		p5-Throwable>=0.100090:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Throwable
+		p5-Throwable>=0.200003:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Throwable
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
-
 TEST_DEPENDS=	p5-Capture-Tiny>=0.08:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Capture-Tiny \
 		p5-Sub-Override>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Sub-Override \
 		p5-Test-MockObject>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-MockObject
@@ -27,32 +33,6 @@ TEST_DEPENDS=	p5-Capture-Tiny>=0.08:${PO
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
 
-MAN3=	Email::Sender.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Failure.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Failure::Multi.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Failure::Permanent.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Failure::Temporary.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Manual.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Manual::QuickStart.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Role::CommonSending.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Role::HasMessage.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Simple.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Success.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Success::Partial.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Transport.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Transport::DevNull.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Transport::Failable.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Transport::Maildir.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Transport::Mbox.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Transport::Print.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Transport::SMTP.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Transport::SMTP::Persistent.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Transport::Sendmail.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Transport::Test.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Transport::Wrapper.3 \
-	Email::Sender::Util.3
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 .if ${PERL_LEVEL} < 501400

==============================================================================
--- head/mail/p5-Email-Sender/distinfo	Sun Dec  1 17:56:14 2013	(r335416)
+++ head/mail/p5-Email-Sender/distinfo	Sun Dec  1 17:58:31 2013	(r335417)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

@@ -23,6 +23,30 @@

 %%SITE_PERL%%/Email/Sender/Util.pm
 %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Email/Sender/.packlist

+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Email::Sender::Role::HasMessage.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Email::Sender::Simple.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Email::Sender::Success.3.gz

+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Email::Sender::Transport.3.gz

+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Email::Sender::Transport::Failable.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Email::Sender::Transport::Maildir.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Email::Sender::Transport::Mbox.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Email::Sender::Transport::Print.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Email::Sender::Transport::SMTP.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Email::Sender::Transport::SMTP::Persistent.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Email::Sender::Transport::Sendmail.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Email::Sender::Transport::Test.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Email::Sender::Transport::Wrapper.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Email::Sender::Util.3.gz
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Email/Sender
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Email
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Email/Sender/Transport/SMTP
